full_text:
Zhang (Ziqian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang, styledZiqian. Surrendered to Cao Cao, mocking his old enemy Shen Pei who in turn called Ziqian a turncoat. Zhang was affiliated with Yuan Shang and the Wei Kingdom.
